name: Grill Cleaning Brush Blue Nylon Bristles Black - Room Essentials™: Long Handle, Sponge, Metal Scraper
description: Keep your grill in top-notch condition with this Grill Cleaning Brush with Nylon Bristles from Room Essentials™. Designed with a long handle to reach the farthest ends of the grill, this grill brush features thick nylon bristles on three sides for scraping away food from your grill. The attached sponge allows to spread soapy lather to wipe away oil, while the metal scraper at the end makes removing grease and grime effortless. Plus, it's designed with a loop at the end of the handle to hang it from a hook for storage.
